title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.20 - Workshop can now play all Planned more than once per turn (the once-per-turn limit stays on Remix, Showtime and Da Capo). Experience now starts Tuned, drops Exhaust, and starts each combat Planned when upgraded. Tidied the Swap and Planned keyword descriptions.
